title: Performance Optimization
principles: Keep GitHub Pages static and dependency-light.
Prefer additive optimization over disruptive rewrites.
Preserve the existing design system and navigation.
Optimize images, CSS, JavaScript, metadata, and caching behavior incrementally.

targets.pageWeight: keep each page as light as possible; defer non-critical scripts

checks.action: Use width and height attributes, loading=lazy for below-fold images, and modern formats where possible.
Keep Phase CSS additive, remove duplicate rules in later consolidation passes, and avoid unnecessary third-party CSS.
Load static filtering scripts with defer and keep each page script small.
Use system fonts or preconnect for external font providers if used.
Document GitHub Pages caching limits and use stable asset paths where possible.
Maintain semantic headings, alt text, contrast, and keyboard-friendly controls.
